productDisplayName: Warner Bros Kids Unisex Purple Sandals
description: Style Note Let your little one flip flop in pure comfort and joy in this pair of Looney Tunes flip flops from warner bros. With a cushioned footbed and a grippy outsole, it makes for a safe pair of casual footwear. Product Details Strap at the forefoot with a cut-out design and an ankle strap Textured footbed Rubber outsole with patterned lugs and two suction points Material and Care Rubber Wipe surface with a clean, damp cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
